milestones.title: Phase 0 — Arrow Dataset Generation
milestones.description: Master Arrow repository, partition pipeline in {pipdata}, release manifest generation.

features.title: Version as partition key with manifest-based resolution
features.description: Add version (vermast_veralt) as a 4th Hive partition key. Manifest file_path is the sole version-resolution mechanism for {piptm}. Multiple versions coexist on disk.

features.title: Manifest generation and partition-filter loading
features.description: Transition manifest from file_path to partition filter keys. Release-inventory-driven generation in {pipdata} with dimension introspection. Manifest loading and open_dataset()|>filter() data access in {piptm}.

milestones.title: Phase 1 — Computation Engine
milestones.description: Core computation engine: family-based orchestrator for poverty, inequality, and welfare measures with disaggregation across dimensions.

features.title: Measure registry and input validation
features.description: Define 19 canonical measures (5 poverty, 2 inequality, 12 welfare) in .MEASURE_REGISTRY. Implement .classify_measures(), .validate_by(), .validate_poverty_lines() validators.

features.title: Family-level compute functions
features.description: Implement compute_poverty() (FGT measures), compute_inequality() (Gini, MLD), compute_welfare() (mean, median, quantiles, etc.) with collapse backend.

features.title: Family-based computation orchestrator (compute_measures)
features.description: Orchestrator dispatches compute_poverty(), compute_inequality(), compute_welfare() based on requested measure families. Builds compound GRP(c('pip_id', by)) for batch processing. Long-format output with poverty_line, measure, value, population columns.

features.title: Disaggregation across dimensions (gender, area, education, age)
features.description: Support up to 4 dimensions including at most 1 education column. Age binning (0–14, 15–24, 25–64, 65+). NA-fill for partial-match surveys. Dimension pre-filter with warnings.

milestones.title: Phase 2 — table_maker() Top-Level API
milestones.description: Build the top-level table_maker() API function, data loading pipeline, and orchestration layer. Implement pip_lookup() triplet resolver. Optimize orchestration and I/O.

features.title: table_maker() with dual input patterns (pip_id and triplets)
features.description: Implement table_maker(pip_id | country_code/year/welfare_type, measures, poverty_lines, by, release). Accept pip_id for API usage; fall back to triplet resolution via pip_lookup() for ad-hoc R console usage.

features.title: pip_lookup() triplet-to-pip_id resolver
features.description: Translate human-friendly (country_code, year, welfare_type) tuples to canonical pip_ids via manifest inner join. Emit warnings for unmatched triplets.

features.title: load_surveys() data loading with manifest resolution
features.description: Resolve manifest entries to Arrow partition paths. Lazy load via open_dataset(). Column selection and dictionary casting. Return with metadata columns (pip_id, country_code, surveyid_year, welfare_type).

features.title: Orchestration: batch vs. per-survey optimization
features.description: Compare Approach A (per-survey lapply with GRP rebuild) vs Approach B (single batch GRP). Benchmark on 15 surveys × 50 iterations. Adopt Approach B (72% faster, 0.127s vs 0.432s). Update table_maker() implementation.

features.title: Arrow push-down vs. in-memory compute benchmark
features.description: Measure feasibility of pushing grouping/aggregation to Arrow vs. loading and computing in R. Identify which measures can be pushed down (headcount, gini, mean via collapse). Document performance implications for future optimization.

milestones.title: Phase 3 — Validation, Testing & Quality
milestones.description: Build comprehensive test suite, parquet validation layer, performance profiling, and documentation.

features.title: Parquet file validation (schema + data checks)
features.description: Implement validate_parquet_schema() (structural checks, dictionary type index width tolerance) and validate_parquet_data() (row-level validation: required columns present, no NAs in welfare/weight, factor level checks). Fast schema-only checks for pipeline validation.

features.title: Unit test suite (≥90% coverage)
features.description: Tests for measure registry, validators, family compute functions, orchestrator, data loading, and table_maker(). Fixture-based testing with synthetic survey data. 414 tests written; 414 passing.

features.title: Performance benchmarking and profiling
features.description: Profile I/O, compute, and GC overhead. Document 15-survey and 100-survey performance. Identify optimization targets for future work.

features.title: Documentation: API reference and developer guide
features.description: roxygen2 docstrings for all exported and internal functions. Developer guide for extending measure registry. Architecture overview (manifest, computation pipeline, output schema).

features.title: CRAN readiness (devtools::check clean)
features.description: Resolve all warnings, notes, and errors from R CMD check. Finalize NAMESPACE, imports, and package metadata.

milestones.title: Phase 4 — API Service Layer
milestones.description: Build plumber service layer connecting PIP UI platform to table_maker(). Support GET/POST endpoints, request validation, response serialization.

features.title: Plumber /table endpoint (GET/POST)
features.description: Accept pip_id vector, measures, poverty_lines, by dimensions. Return long-format JSON with poverty_line, measure, value, population. Support batch requests (>50 surveys via POST with JSON body).

features.title: Plumber /lookup endpoint
features.description: Resolve (country_code, year, welfare_type) triplets to pip_ids for UI discovery. Caching layer for manifest queries.

features.title: Error handling, logging, and request tracing
features.description: Structured error responses (invalid pip_ids, unsupported measures, missing poverty_lines). Request logging with timestamps and parameter echoing. Optional telemetry for performance monitoring.
